hero.title: Logos Builders Hub
hero.eyebrow: Build the future of Civil Society.
hero.description: The logos technology stack is our toolkit for charting a new path. The builder hub provides ideas, resources, and everything you need to start your expedition into a new frontier.

inspiration.title: Get Inspired
inspiration.ideasDescription: Browse ideas from the community, vote on ones you love, or submit your own
inspiration.issuesDescription: Pick up good first issues to get you started and submit your first PR

cards.title: Install Basecamp
cards.description: Logos Basecamp is a complete distribution that bundles the kernel, the default modules, and UI packages into a usable interface. It allows you to easily interact with simple apps built on the various modules.

cards.title: Run a Node in less than 10 minutes Using CLI
cards.description: Participate in the network by becoming a node operator. Connect to the testnet in 10 minutes and engage with the protocol.

ctas.label: Run a Node in less than 10 minutes Using CLI

cards.title: Read the docs
cards.description: Deep dive into the Logos stack architecture, modules, APIs and integration guides.

cards.title: Start with the Scaffold Boilerplate
cards.description: A Rust CLI for bootstrapping LSSA program_deployment projects in standalone mode.

cards.title: Sample Apps
cards.description: Run real sample apps to learn from.

cards.title: Workshops and Tutorials
cards.description: Live coding sessions and step by step guides.

programs.title: Builder Programmes
programs.prizeHeading: The frontier is open. Build what’s next.
programs.prizeDescription: Lambda Prizes is a competitive prize framework for the Logos ecosystem. λPrize targets contributions where Logos cares about the outcome but not the path.
programs.rfpsDescription: The Logos RFP Program supports developers to build applications on the Logos Stack. Browse all open requests for proposals below.

cards.title: Follow us on X
cards.description: For announcements, updates and threads (Logos and Logos Devs)

cards.title: Schedule a call and speak with a contributor
Join Discord
cards.description: Chat with us and get real time support.

overviewLinks.title: RFPs
overviewLinks.description: Funded calls for builders to ship privacy-first decentralised applications.

overviewLinks.title: Resources
overviewLinks.description: Quick starts, documentation, and reference implementations.

overviewLinks.title: GitHub Issues
overviewLinks.description: Open work items across the Logos repositories.

overviewLinks.title: Contribute
overviewLinks.description: Pathways for joining the build — from one-off issues to long-term contributions.

rfpsSection.title: RFPs
rfpsSection.description: Funded calls for builders to ship Logos-powered applications.

ideasSection.title: Ideas
ideasSection.description: Ideas from our community driving sovereignty forward.

appInstall.title: Install Basecamp.
appInstall.description: The Logos App is a complete distribution that bundles the kernel, the default modules, and UI packages into a usable product. It provides the primary user interface, hosting "Simple Apps" that let users interact with the various modules:

actionPanels.title: Get started faster with boilerplate apps
actionPanels.description: Community boilerplate reference implementations that can save time and effort.

resourcesSection.title: Additional Resources
resourcesSection.description: Reference material to help you ship faster.

documentation.description: Understand the core concepts of the Logos network and its technology stack.
